title: Nami Looks for Sky Island Clues
description: Mock Town shows the crew a different kind of pirate: Bellamy and his men mock dreams while Nami searches for information about Sky Island.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Nami, Bellamy, Sarquiss, Mock Town pirate, Luffy. Mock Town shows the crew a different kind of pirate: Bellamy and his men mock dreams while Nami searches for information about Sky Island.

dialogue.text: How painful it must have been...

dialogue.text: A Conse- Quence of your everyday actions...

dialogue.speaker: Sarquiss
